description: Use this API to add an individual generator reserve data record to the working case. It may also be used to modify an existing generator reserve data record. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = opf_genrsv_indv(eibus, genid, realar)

realar.description: unit ramp rate in MW/minute (default value of 9999.0 if new record, current value otherwise).
unit capability in MW (default value of 9999.0 if new record, current value otherwise).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
